---
title: "SPY Market Dashboard"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
---

## 📦 Load data

```python
import yfinance as yf
import pandas as pd
import plotly.express as px

ticker = "SPY"

df = yf.Ticker(ticker).history(period="1y").reset_index()
df.head()
```

---

## 💰 Compute metrics

```python
latest_price = df["Close"].iloc[-1]
start_price = df["Close"].iloc[0]

change_pct = ((latest_price - start_price) / start_price) * 100

high_52w = df["Close"].max()
low_52w = df["Close"].min()

latest_price, change_pct, high_52w, low_52w
```

---

## 📊 Market Snapshot

### Current Price

```python
latest_price
```

### 1Y Return (%)

```python
change_pct
```

### 52W High

```python
high_52w
```

### 52W Low

```python
low_52w
```

---

## 📈 SPY Price Chart (1Y)

```python
fig = px.line(
    df,
    x="Date",
    y="Close",
    title="S&P 500 Proxy (SPY) — 1 Year Performance"
)

fig
```

---

## 📉 Daily Returns Distribution

```python
df["Daily Return"] = df["Close"].pct_change()

fig2 = px.histogram(
    df,
    x="Daily Return",
    title="SPY Daily Returns Distribution"
)

fig2
```
